title: Living in Boulder vlog 9 -  7 -  2017: Lactantius, started Mountain Screen Captures

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps his September 7th day in Boulder: getting his car repaired at a dealership, troubleshooting his Garmin watt meter, completing screen captures of mountains accessible from Boulder for a cycling project, and reading Lactantius's Divine Institutions. He also discusses his plan to calibrate his watt meter the next day and track his cycling power output.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: One of the most fascinating books you could read — Lactantius argues the pagan gods were just historical people, not real gods
Excited about it as an easy starting point for bike riding; sees it as a long-term project worth doing
Frustrated but determined to resolve it before fully committing to training
